---
title: "Basic Info v9"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')`"
---

# Purpose

This is step 1 of the v9 pipeline. It reads `evidence.txt` and `experimental_design.xlsx`, prepares the cleaned evidence table, and creates the shared design object for the later steps.

# Settings

```{r settings}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(readxl)
})

load_project_packages <- function(pkgs) {
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(
    invisible(lapply(pkgs, library, character.only = TRUE))
  )
}

root <- "C:/Users/mkm274/OneDrive - TUNI.fi/Desktop/Jafari_Lab/MSProt2026/capstoneProject"
workflow_version <- "v9"

pth <- list(
  project_root = root,
  evidence_path = file.path(root, "evidence.txt"),
  experimental_design_path = file.path(root, "experimental_design.xlsx"),
  basic_table = file.path(root, "Basic_Info_v9", "tables"),
  basic_plots = file.path(root, "Basic_Info_v9", "plots")
)

dir.create(pth$basic_table, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(pth$basic_plots, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

condition_order_default <- c(
  "CTRL",
  "c-jun_KO",
  "CTRL_cDDP_06h",
  "c-jun_KO_cDDP_06h",
  "CTRL_JNK-IN-8_cDDP_06h",
  "CTRL_cDDP_24h",
  "c-jun_KO_cDDP_24h",
  "CTRL_JNK-IN-8_cDDP_24h"
)
```

# Functions

```{r functions}
clean_key <- function(x) {
  gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "", tolower(as.character(x)))
}

standardize_design_names <- function(dt) {
  key <- stats::setNames(names(dt), clean_key(names(dt)))
  pick <- function(x) unname(key[x[x %in% names(key)][1]])

  cols <- c(
    RawFile = pick(c("rawfile", "rawfilename", "rawdatafile", "commentrawdatafile", "raw", "filename", "file")),
    SourceBlock = pick(c("sourceblock", "block", "source", "batch", "groupblock")),
    OriginalSampleGroup = pick(c("originalsamplegroup", "samplegroup", "originalgroup", "experimentlabel", "experiment", "sample")),
    Condition = pick(c("condition", "finalcondition", "biologicalcondition", "group", "treatment")),
    BioRep = pick(c("biologicalreplicateno", "biologicalreplicatenumber", "biorep", "biologicalreplicate", "replicate")),
    BioExperiment = pick(c("finalbioexperiment", "bioexperiment", "biologicalexperiment", "finalbiologicalexperiment", "finalexperiment", "experimentname")),
    TechRep = pick(c("technicalreplicateno", "technicalreplicatenumber", "techrep", "technicalreplicate"))
  )

  for (nm in names(cols)) {
    if (!is.na(cols[[nm]]) && cols[[nm]] != nm) data.table::setnames(dt, cols[[nm]], nm)
  }

  dt[]
}
```

# Experimental Design

```{r experimental_design}
sheets <- readxl::excel_sheets(pth$experimental_design_path)
design_sheet <- unique(c(intersect(c("RawFile_Map", "Tabelle1", "Sheet1"), sheets), sheets))[1]
raw_map <- data.table::as.data.table(readxl::read_excel(pth$experimental_design_path, sheet = design_sheet))
raw_map <- standardize_design_names(raw_map)

raw_map <- raw_map[!is.na(RawFile) & trimws(as.character(RawFile)) != ""]
raw_map[, RawFile := trimws(as.character(RawFile))]
raw_map[, SourceBlock := trimws(as.character(SourceBlock))]
raw_map[SourceBlock == "20260331", SourceBlock := "RS"]
raw_map[, OriginalSampleGroup := trimws(as.character(OriginalSampleGroup))]
raw_map[, Condition := trimws(as.character(Condition))]
raw_map[, BioExperiment := trimws(as.character(BioExperiment))]
raw_map[, BioRep := suppressWarnings(as.integer(BioRep))]
raw_map[, TechRep := suppressWarnings(as.integer(TechRep))]

raw_map <- raw_map[, .(
  RawFile,
  SourceBlock,
  OriginalSampleGroup,
  Condition,
  BioRep,
  BioExperiment,
  TechRep
)]

cond <- c(
  condition_order_default[condition_order_default %in% unique(raw_map$Condition)],
  setdiff(sort(unique(raw_map$Condition)), condition_order_default)
)

raw_map[, Condition := factor(Condition, levels = cond)]
data.table::setorder(raw_map, Condition, BioExperiment, TechRep)
```

# Evidence

```{r evidence}
evi_cols <- c(
  "Sequence",
  "Modified sequence",
  "Proteins",
  "Leading proteins",
  "Gene names",
  "Protein names",
  "Raw file",
  "Experiment",
  "Intensity",
  "Reverse",
  "Potential contaminant",
  "PEP",
  "Score"
)

evi <- data.table::fread(
  pth$evidence_path,
  sep = "\t",
  select = intersect(evi_cols, names(data.table::fread(pth$evidence_path, nrows = 0))),
  showProgress = TRUE,
  data.table = TRUE
)

for (cc in setdiff(evi_cols, names(evi))) evi[, (cc) := NA]
for (cc in c("Intensity", "PEP", "Score")) evi[, (cc) := suppressWarnings(as.numeric(get(cc)))]

evi[, RawFile := trimws(as.character(`Raw file`))]
evi[, Experiment := trimws(as.character(Experiment))]
evi_ann <- merge(evi, raw_map, by = "RawFile", all.x = FALSE)

clean_evi <- evi_ann[
  (is.na(Reverse) | Reverse != "+") &
    (is.na(`Potential contaminant`) | `Potential contaminant` != "+") &
    !is.na(Intensity) & Intensity > 0
]

clean_evi[, PeptideForCounting := as.character(`Modified sequence`)]
clean_evi[is.na(PeptideForCounting) | PeptideForCounting == "", PeptideForCounting := as.character(Sequence)]
clean_evi[, LeadingProteinForCounting := data.table::fifelse(
  !is.na(`Leading proteins`) & `Leading proteins` != "",
  as.character(`Leading proteins`),
  as.character(Proteins)
)]
```

# Summary Tables

```{r summary_tables}
prefilter_summary <- data.table::data.table(
  Metric = c(
    "Raw evidence rows",
    "Reverse hits",
    "Potential contaminants",
    "Reverse or contaminant",
    "Missing intensity",
    "Zero or negative intensity",
    "PEP missing"
  ),
  Count = c(
    nrow(evi),
    sum(!is.na(evi$Reverse) & evi$Reverse == "+"),
    sum(!is.na(evi$`Potential contaminant`) & evi$`Potential contaminant` == "+"),
    sum((!is.na(evi$Reverse) & evi$Reverse == "+") |
          (!is.na(evi$`Potential contaminant`) & evi$`Potential contaminant` == "+")),
    sum(is.na(evi$Intensity)),
    sum(!is.na(evi$Intensity) & evi$Intensity <= 0),
    sum(is.na(evi$PEP))
  )
)

condition_summary <- clean_evi[, .(
  Biological_experiments = data.table::uniqueN(BioExperiment),
  Raw_files = data.table::uniqueN(RawFile),
  Groups = data.table::uniqueN(SourceBlock),
  Evidence_rows = .N,
  Peptides = data.table::uniqueN(PeptideForCounting),
  Proteins = data.table::uniqueN(LeadingProteinForCounting)
), by = Condition]

data.table::setorder(condition_summary, Condition)

data.table::fwrite(prefilter_summary, file.path(pth$basic_table, "prefilter_summary.csv"))
data.table::fwrite(condition_summary, file.path(pth$basic_table, "condition_summary.csv"))

prefilter_summary
condition_summary
```

# Shared Object

```{r shared_object}
basic_obj <- list(
  project_root = root,
  paths = pth,
  raw_map = raw_map,
  condition_order = cond,
  evidence_header = names(evi),
  prefilter_summary = prefilter_summary,
  condition_summary = condition_summary,
  settings = list(workflow_version = workflow_version)
)
```

# Final Detection Counts

```{r final_detection_counts}
final_detection_counts <- data.table::data.table(
  Metric = c("Peptides detected from all samples", "Proteins detected from all samples"),
  Count = c(
    data.table::uniqueN(clean_evi$PeptideForCounting),
    data.table::uniqueN(clean_evi$LeadingProteinForCounting)
  )
)

print(final_detection_counts)
```
